subprograms.name: car
subprograms.code: procedure car(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Get the rest of a list

subprograms.name: cdr
subprograms.code: procedure cdr(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Create a list verbatum from the parameter list

subprograms.name: cons
subprograms.code: procedure cons(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Get the first item of a list

subprograms.name: list
subprograms.code: procedure list(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Replace the CAR of a list with a value

subprograms.name: quote
subprograms.code: procedure quote(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description:
Create a list by evaluating the parameters, similar to quote, but quote
  does not evaluate the parameters.

subprograms.name: rplaca
subprograms.code: procedure rplaca(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Replace the CDR of a list with a value

subprograms.name: rplacd
subprograms.code: procedure rplacd(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Append one list to another (currently unimplemented).
